prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科组最低位次：2021年约3813名，2022年约3675名，2023年约15834名（当年出现明显断档），2024年约4127名，2025年约4066名。近四年（剔除2 023年异常值）位次在3675-4127之间窄幅波动，2025年基准约4066名，整体呈稳中略降趋势；该校在青海省理科组招生计划：2021年8人、2022年12人、2023年1 1人、2024年12人、2025年（物理类）14人；2026年计划16人，较2025年扩招2人（+14.3%），扩招意味着竞争相对缓解，对位次有下移（更容易进）的拉动作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南师范大学为211、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在86-92名区间（2026年约第92名），属于全国中上游水平，在师范类院校中位居前列；2025年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及文学院教授公开羞辱求助学生事件，对学校形象有一定负面影响；抖音热度排名第100（评价为一般），短视频平台曝光度较低，整体报 考热度无明显升温信号。历史投档异常记录中未见该校断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，外国语言文学获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；其余招生专业（数学、 化学、物理、法学等）虽未获A类评级，但师范类学科底蕴深厚，整体学科实力均衡。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社会热度呈分化观望态势，计算机类、电子信息/ 通信、电气工程等工科专业热度较高；青海省2026年普通高考总人数约48000人（较2025年总人数约47669人略有增加），物理类考生估算约30670人，与2025年物理类30457人基本 持平，考生规模变化不大；湖南师范大学位于湖南省长沙市，属跨省招生；该校在青海省招生占比极小（约0.4%），地域 偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4066名、2026年扩招14.3%以及声誉偏负面、考生规模持平、专业热度分化等因素， 扩招效应主导位次下移（更容易进），但声誉偏负面和师范类专业热度分化对报考热度有一定抑制作用。预测2026年理科组最低位次约4425名，区间3925-4925名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021-2025 minimum rankings for science group: approximately 3813 in 2021, 3675 in 2022, 15834 in 2023 (significant gap that year), 4127 in 2024, and 4066 in 2025. In the past four years (excluding the 2023 anomaly), rankings fluctuated narrowly between 3675 and 4127, with a baseline of about 4066 in 2025, showing a stable to slightly declining trend. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Qinghai Province: 8 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 14 in 2025 (Physics Category). The 2026 plan is 16, an increase of 2 (+14.3%) compared to 2025, indicating relatively eased competition and a downward pull on rankings (easier admission).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science university ranking has been stable in the 86-92 range in recent years (approximately 92nd in 2026), placing it at the upper-middle level nationally and among the top in normal universities. In 2025, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to an incident where a professor from the School of Literature publicly humiliated a student seeking help, which has a certain negative impact on the university's image. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 100 (rated as average), with low exposure on short video platforms, and no clear signal of increased application enthusiasm. No historical admission anomalies indicate a gap for this university. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Language and Literature received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university. Other enrollment majors (Mathematics, Chemistry, Physics, Law, etc.) did not receive A-level ratings, but the normal disciplines have deep foundations, and overall disciplinary strength is balanced.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for normal/education majors shows a divided and wait-and-see attitude, while engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province general college entrance examination is approximately 48,000 (slightly up from about 47,669 in 2025), with an estimated 30,670 Physics Category candidates, roughly the same as the 30,457 in 2025, indicating little change in candidate scale. Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha, Hunan Province, and recruits across provinces. The university's enrollment proportion in Qinghai Province is very small (about 0.4%), so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4066, the 14.3% enrollment expansion in 2026, the slightly negative reputation, stable candidate scale, and divided major popularity, the expansion effect dominates a downward shift in rankings (easier admission), but the slightly negative reputation and divided popularity of normal majors have some inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm. The predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 science group is approximately 4425, with a range of 3925-4925.

- Chemistry (Normal)
- Physics (Normal)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Law
- Geographic Science (Normal)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3925-4925, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application range, with Tier 1 majors as reach options (requiring rankings significantly better than the upper limit), and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Normal) and Data Science and Big Data Technology are popular majors in the university's science group, with intense competition. Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation has the lowest historical ranking, suitable for candidates with lower rankings as a stable choice.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021-2025 minimum rankings for liberal arts group: 2021 approximately 643rd, 2022 approximately 921st, 2023 approximately 1001st, 2024 approximately 863rd, 2025 (History Category) approximately 799th. Overall shows a V-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing, bottoming out in 2023 and rebounding for two consecutive years, with a baseline of approximately 799th in 2025; enrollment plan for this university in Qinghai Province liberal arts group: 2021 8 students, 2022 10 students, 2023 12 students, 2024 11 students, 2025 (History Category) 9 students; 2026 plan 7 students, a reduction of 2 students (-22.2%) compared to 2025, meaning intensified competition and an upward (harder to enter) pull on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Rankings have been stable in the 86-92 range in recent years (approximately 92nd in 2026), placing it at the mid-to-upper level nationally and among the top in normal universities; reputation evaluation in 2025 is somewhat negative, mainly involving an incident where a professor from the College of Literature publicly humiliated a student seeking help, which has a certain negative impact on the university's image; Douyin popularity ranking is 100th (rated as average), with low exposure on short video platforms, and no clear signal of increased application heat overall. No signs of gaps in historical admission anomalies; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Language and Literature received an A-, the only A- or above discipline for this university; the liberal arts group enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Ideological and Political Education, Political Science and Public Administration, Geography Science) have not received A-level ratings, but the normal disciplines have deep foundations.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of normal/education majors shows a divided and wait-and-see trend, with Chinese Language and Literature being relatively hot; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Qinghai Province in 2026 is approximately 48,000, with History Category candidates estimated at about 17,330, basically unchanged from 17,212 in 2025, with little change in candidate scale; Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, and is a cross-province enrollment; the university's enrollment share in Qinghai Province is very small (about 0.4%), so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 799th, the 22.2% enrollment reduction in 2026, the somewhat negative reputation, stable candidate scale, and divided major popularity, the enrollment reduction effect dominates the upward shift in rankings (harder to enter), but the upward trend in rankings over the past two years and the somewhat negative reputation form a certain offset. The predicted minimum ranking for the liberal arts group in 2026 is approximately 688th, with a range of 564-812th.

Chinese Language and Literature (Normal) is the most popular major in the liberal arts group with the highest historical rankings and the most intense competition; Geography Science (Normal) has the lowest historical rankings and is a stable choice for candidates with lower rankings.
